title: reposets Credentials
description: Authentication profiles for reposets. This file should be gitignored.

profiles.description: Named credential profiles. If only one profile is defined, it is used automatically for all repo groups.
profiles.title: Credential profiles

github_token.description: A GitHub personal access token (fine-grained) with administration, secrets, variables, environments, and GPG keys permissions
github_token.title: GitHub token

op_service_account_token.description: A 1Password service account token for resolving op:// secret references
op_service_account_token.title: 1Password service account token

CredentialProfile.description: Authentication credentials for a GitHub account with optional named values for secret and variable resolution
CredentialProfile.title: Credential profile

op.description: Named values resolved via 1Password SDK. Values are op:// reference strings.
op.title: 1Password references

file.description: Named values read from files. Values are file paths relative to the credentials directory.
file.title: File references

value.description: Named inline values. Strings are used as-is, objects are JSON-stringified.
value.title: Inline values

ResolveSection.description: Named values resolved from 1Password, files, or inline. Referenced by resolved entries in secret and variable groups.
ResolveSection.title: Resolve section
